name: Codex Reference Pack
description: General-purpose local reference bundle for Codex image or UI work.
defaultGoal: Use the attached local references to guide the result.
defaultApplyInstructions: Preserve the strongest visual cues from the references while adapting them to the requested output.
defaultForbiddenRules: Do not invent details that conflict with the provided references.

name: Style Board
description: Summarize shape language, color, materials, and mood across selected references.
defaultGoal: Extract a reusable visual style direction from these references.
defaultApplyInstructions: Focus on repeated design traits, proportions, palette, lighting, and composition.
defaultForbiddenRules: Do not copy a single reference literally unless explicitly requested.

name: UI Analysis
description: Prepare selected interface references for implementation planning.
defaultGoal: Analyze these UI references and translate them into implementable interface guidance.
defaultApplyInstructions: Call out layout structure, controls, density, hierarchy, spacing, and reusable components.
defaultForbiddenRules: Do not treat decorative details as functional requirements unless the reference makes them clear.
